caption: A man with a distinctive, spiked silver-grey hairstyle sits in a studio setting, wearing a white button-down shirt, a small red and white bow tie, and black over-ear headphones. He faces slightly to the left with a neutral expression. In front of him is a professional black microphone on a boom arm. The background is filled with a wall of framed photographs and a glimpse of clothing items, including a yellow shirt with the brand "LEE" visible. On-screen graphics appear on both sides of the frame; a logo on the left reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" with a microphone icon, and a similar logo on the right says "BOSS TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man remains nearly motionless, with only subtle shifts in his posture and gaze as he maintains his position in the recording environment.
